title: Mandatory Brand Brain finalization is blocked by trial or AI limits
original_report: On Step 4 of Brand Brain, both Finish and Skip Instagram stay on the page and show a generic failure toast.
discovery_scope: AI and Brand Brain usage enforcement
expected: The first mandatory Brand Brain completion saves and unlocks Signals without paid provider calls when AI access is unavailable.
actual: The API returned 402 plan_limit_reached for exhausted AI usage; an expired trial also prevented completion.
environment: Node.js, Windows, isolated temporary JSON database, controlled local Gemini fixture
reproduction: An incomplete workspace at wizard Step 4 exhausts ai_operations or has an expired trial, then POSTs complete authored answers to /agent/context/finalize.
failure_signal: Expected HTTP 200 complete=true, received HTTP 402; both UI buttons share this endpoint and displayed the generic failure toast.
root_cause: The finalize route rethrew provider usage denials and the persistence boundary enforced trial/save limits even for the mandatory first Brand Brain completion.
fix_summary: For incomplete Brand Brain only, detect unavailable AI before provider work, use the deterministic fallback, and allow the mandatory first save when trial/save enforcement would otherwise trap the user. Completed-brand Settings edits remain strictly metered.
why_causal: The change affects only the two blocking boundaries reached by first-time finalization; the same request now persists without provider calls while the existing completed-brand denial regression still returns 402.

reproduction_files.summary: Approved exhausted-quota and expired-trial onboarding regressions.

fix_files.summary: Mandatory-onboarding usage fallback and first-save handling.

checks.name: Exhausted AI onboarding reproducer
checks.detail: Red 402 before; green 200 with zero provider calls after.

checks.name: Expired trial onboarding reproducer
checks.detail: Red trial_expired before; green 200 with zero provider calls after.

checks.name: Complete hardening suite
checks.detail: Usage denial for completed-brand edits, concurrency, empty bank, and strict V2 remain green.

checks.name: API, public beta, browser, and build
checks.detail: Wizard API, public-beta guards, My Brands browser suite, syntax check, and production build passed.

limitations: The user's authenticated production response body was not accessible; the reproducer proves the exact reachable code paths shown by the screenshot and generic toast.
residual_risks: A deployment must include the new backend commit before the production account can be retested.
notes: No paid provider call is made by either mandatory-onboarding fallback.
Settings edits after Brand Brain completion continue to respect trial and AI limits.
backend/data/db.json was not edited or staged.
